allow: Bash(mysql -uroot -proot -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 ORTODYNAMIC -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) total FROM comuni;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -proot -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 ORTODYNAMIC -e "SELECT Comune, Provincia, CAP FROM comuni WHERE Comune IN \(SELECT Comune FROM comuni GROUP BY Comune HAVING COUNT\(*\)>1\) ORDER BY Comune LIMIT 12;")
